title: Roasted Chicken Canadian Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole featuring roasted chicken, mildly seasoned to perfection. This dish is perfect for a cold winter's night.

ingredients.name: Mildly Seasoned French Onion Soup Mix

instructions: Cook the Canadian bacon slices in a skillet until crispy. Set aside.
In the same skillet, cook the chicken breast until browned on all sides and cooked through. Cut into bite-sized pieces.
In a separate saucepan, combine the cream of chicken soup, flour, and milk. Stir until smooth.
Add the cooked chicken, Canadian bacon, and frozen peas and carrots to the saucepan. Stir until well combined.
Pour the sauce over the top of the casserole and sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
